name: property managers handling 10-20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, inefficient tracking of inspections causes compliance issues. We provide automated compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking property inspections and generating timely audit reports.
